finance.payrollPageHint: This page is linked to rep data: attendance, response speed, follow-ups, and call count vs target.
finance.payrollRequestPending: Request status: awaiting owner approval — by {{name}}

finance.nextInstallmentPrompt: Next installment due (YYYY-MM-DD) — leave empty if none remaining

finance.quotesPendingOwner: {{count}} quotes awaiting owner approval in the approvals hub.
finance.toastInvoiceLockedMonth: Cannot edit invoice in a closed month

finance.recordPaymentHint: Choose payout method for ledger and accounting movement.
finance.toastExpensePayUpdateFailed: Update failed — check approval, closed month, or database setup
finance.toastCoaDeleteFailed: Cannot delete this account (system or used in journals)

finance.allowedCostCentersLabel: Allowed cost centers for sales quotes (comma-separated)
finance.expenseCodesHint: Set a prefix per category; used automatically when coding expenses.
finance.customerCodeHint: Prefix used when generating customer codes on invoices.
finance.deleteAllJournalsConfirm: Delete all journal entries permanently? This cannot be undone.
finance.toastJournalDeleteFailed: Cannot delete: closed month/year, or linked to invoice collection or custody

finance.profitabilityHint: Estimated profitability per customer from invoices and cost-center expense allocation.

quoteModal.toastQuoteSendFailed: Could not send — check data and production manager
quoteModal.toastQuoteSent: Pricing request sent to {{name}} — then owner approval, then back to you for client presentation

bookings.approveFailed: Could not approve — check accounting month or expense accrual
bookings.meetingApprovedWithCost: Approved and accrual recorded — complete production items
bookings.executedCash: Executed as cash and recorded financially
bookings.executedTransfer: Executed as transfer and recorded financially
bookings.optionalLeadFromMyLeads: Optional: link a client from your leads
bookings.otherBookingsHint: Log a general activity or request with a text statement; saved in the workspace and visible to all roles.
bookings.statementPh: Statement — describe booking type, appointment, or requirement
bookings.shootApprovedWithAccrual: Approved and accrual recorded — complete production items
bookings.equipmentApprovedWithAccrual: Approved; accrual recorded for accounting — complete production items
bookings.equipmentApproved: Request approved and quantity deducted from available

settingsWork.visualModeHint: Choose classic or cinematic 3D premium look.
settingsWork.employeesHint: Add and edit login accounts, roles, and base salaries.
settingsWork.autoDistributionBody:
The system currently routes leads to the best-fit rep based on:
• Rep skills matching lead category.
• Rep with lowest open lead load.
• Response speed score.
settingsWork.repSkillsHint: Pick one rep to edit their specialties.
settingsWork.noRepsYet: No reps yet. Add them in the employee table above.
settingsWork.printBrandingHint: Used automatically in PDF reports for owner, accountant, and reps.
settingsWork.ownerRowNote: Your account — cannot delete from table
settingsWork.ownerPasswordHint: Change your login password. Current password is required before setting a new one.
settingsWork.newPasswordMin8: New password must be at least 8 characters
settingsWork.leadSourcesHint: Facebook, Instagram, Gmail, LinkedIn, and Google import via n8n workflows directly into Supabase.
settingsWork.n8nFolderNote: Workflows in folder n8n/: Meta, Gmail, Google Sheets. Set SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY; optionally DEFAULT_ASSIGNED_TO_ID to assign leads to the sales manager.
settingsWork.clientWebhookHint: When a quote is approved or the client accepts — workflow: n8n/client-notify.workflow.json
settingsWork.enterpriseHint: Advanced workflow, data quality, and SLA escalation settings.
settingsWork.ownerOnlyAdminHint: Full admin rights for owner only (add/edit/delete)
settingsWork.backupBody: Back up or restore system data. The JSON export from the UI is not a database backup: in server mode it exports a REST snapshot for viewing/archiving only; in local mode it exports demo localStorage keys — use a database backup or official import workflow for full recovery.
settingsWork.exportNoteServer: REST snapshot from server. Restoring this file does not write to the database — use a database backup or local mode import tools.

repPerfView.analysisBody: You have {{assigned}} assigned clients, {{won}} closed as won. Keep following up quickly on overdue clients to improve conversion and revenue.
repPerfView.analysisFootnote: Contact counts as "confirmed" only when you log an activity (call/WhatsApp) with a clear documented note.

productionFund.prodManagerHint: Production manager: line items and invoices before requesting accountant payment
productionFund.deleteAllConfirm: Delete all requests? This cannot be undone.
productionFund.unifiedTableHint: Rows marked custody trust follow the custody path (owner → accountant payout → your receipt → spend lines & settlement). Expense request rows use the same production funding but post as expenses after owner approval and accountant execution — click any row for details.
productionFund.custodyMismatchHint: Custody exists in the system but nothing matches your production manager profile (ensure the accountant selected you on the custody, or that you submitted it). If it persists, reload after sign-in.
productionFund.noRequestsYet: No requests yet — submit one using the form below.
productionFund.noMatchingRows: No rows match your profile in this unified table.
productionFund.bookingsTabHint: Shoot, equipment, and meeting bookings are managed in the Bookings tab.
productionFund.expenseFundingTitle: Production funding request (recorded as expense — shown in unified table)
productionFund.expenseFundingHint: Same funding request treated as production expense: goes to owner then accountant, and appears above as an expense request.
productionFund.submitSuccess: Request sent — it will appear in the unified table as an expense request
productionFund.selectRowHint: Select a row in the table above for details; custody rows open spend lines and settlement when available.
productionFund.noRequestsSelectHint: No requests yet; submit from the form above or wait for the accountant to link a custody trust.
productionFund.awaitingAccountantPay: Owner approved — awaiting accountant payment and payout journal.
productionFund.settlementAfterReceive: Settlement is available after confirming custody receipt (status becomes active).
productionFund.noOtherProdManager: No other production manager registered in the system
productionFund.dashSubtitle: Sales pricing requests, custody, and production funding
productionFund.addLineWithPrice: Add at least one priced line
productionFund.sendPriceToOwner: Send price to owner for approval
productionFund.sendPriceSuccess: Price sent to owner for approval
productionFund.pricingArchiveHint: Quotes you handled or priced that moved past pending — not shown in the active pricing queue.
productionFund.noPricingQueue: No pending pricing requests — new rep quote requests appear here.
productionFund.noWorkOrders: No active work orders — they appear here after the client accepts a quote you priced.
productionFund.noRequestsEmptyHint: No requests yet; submit from the form above or wait for the accountant to link a custody trust.
productionFund.expenseTrackingHint: Track approval and payment from the accountant tab or owner approvals hub. This record is an expense, not a cash custody trust.
productionFund.expenseSpendHint: Record actual spend and attach invoices; saved with the request. Total lines must not exceed the approved amount.
productionFund.readyPickupHint: Accountant recorded payment — enter spend lines and attachments, then Save lines. Submit settlement unlocks after Confirm receipt above.
productionFund.spendOverageHint: If spend exceeds custody, difference is credited (2100). If less, remainder debited to cash (1010) — automatic on accountant approval.
productionFund.settlementAtAccountant: Settlement with accountant — closing journal and custody account (1150).
productionFund.expenseSpendSaveFailed: Could not save — check amount or permissions
productionFund.custodyLinesSaveFailed: Could not save — check custody status
productionFund.settlementSent: Settlement sent to accountant for closing journal
productionFund.settlementSendFailed: Could not submit — lines exceed custody or invalid status
productionFund.bookingSpendHint: Production manager: line items and invoices before requesting accountant payment
productionFund.bookingLineRequired: Add at least one line with description and amount
productionFund.bookingOverEstimate: Line total exceeds estimate by more than 5%
productionFund.bookingSubmitFailed: Could not submit — check server or status
productionFund.bookingSubmitSuccess: Booking sent to accountant for payment

settingsProfile.title: Settings
settingsProfile.loginFirst: Sign in from the main app first
settingsProfile.saveFailed: Could not save — check connection or permissions

settingsProfile.browserUnsupported: This browser does not support desktop notifications for this site.
settingsProfile.avatarUrlHint: The URL is saved in the database in server mode. Clear the field and save to remove a previously added photo.
settingsProfile.notifyDesktopHint: When you set a due time for a task from the home screen, an on-screen toast appears. You can enable browser desktop notifications — they work while the page is open or hidden depending on the option below.

settingsProfile.toastNotifyEnabled: Desktop notifications enabled for task reminders
settingsProfile.toastNotifyDeniedLater: You can allow notifications later from site settings
settingsProfile.toastNotifyRequestFailed: Could not request permission from this browser
settingsProfile.notifyWhenTabOpen: Show desktop notifications even when this tab is open (off by default to avoid duplicating on-screen toasts)
